# Ponytail attribution

- Project: `DietrichGebert/ponytail`
- Version: `4.8.4`
- Commit: `bc9ee949d5f439e8b9f3bb92c6d6d3d1e6ebd324`
- Source: https://github.com/DietrichGebert/ponytail
- License: MIT; see `LICENSE` in this directory.

Vendored components: the six Ponytail skills and Codex lifecycle hook runtime. Local integration changes rename the hook manifest to `hooks/hooks.json` for default Codex plugin discovery, remove unsupported `argument-hint` frontmatter, and connect Ponytail to `coding-workflow`.
